files.patch:
@@ -70,3 +70,4 @@
 - Local projects scanning now correctly traverses security-scoped folder bookmarks resolved to file reference URLs.
 - CI status dots now increase contrast on highlighted menu rows.
 - GitHub “stats still generating” (HTTP 202) no longer clutters the main repo list and is now shown in repo details instead.
+- Fixed CLI/app binary naming collisions on case-insensitive filesystems (CLI builds as `repobarcli` and is embedded as `repobarcli` in the app bundle).

@@ -7,7 +7,8 @@ let package = Package(
         .macOS(.v15),
     ],
     products: [
-        .executable(name: "repobar", targets: ["repobarcli"]),
+        // Named to avoid colliding with `RepoBar` on case-insensitive filesystems.
+        .executable(name: "repobarcli", targets: ["repobarcli"]),
     ],
     dependencies: [
         .package(url: "https://github.com/steipete/Commander", from: "0.2.0"),

@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 set -euo pipefail
 
 ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
-CLI_PATH="${1:-$ROOT_DIR/.build/debug/repobar}"
+CLI_PATH="${1:-$ROOT_DIR/.build/debug/repobarcli}"
 
 log() { printf '%s\n' "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] $*"; }

@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ kill_existing
 
 log "==> swift build"
 swift build -q
-swift build -q --product repobar
+swift build -q --product repobarcli
 
 log "==> swift test"
 swift test -q
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ fi
 
 log "==> Launching debug build"
 APP_BUNDLE="${ROOT_DIR}/.build/debug/${APP_NAME}.app"
-EXPECTED_PROCESS="${APP_BUNDLE}/Contents/MacOS/${APP_NAME}"
+EXPECTED_PROCESS_RESOLVED="$(cd "${APP_BUNDLE}" && pwd -P)/Contents/MacOS/${APP_NAME}"
 if [ -d "${APP_BUNDLE}" ]; then
   # Launch via LaunchServices so the process has a proper bundle identifier (menubar item, single-instance, URL handlers).
   open -n -g "${APP_BUNDLE}"
@@ -61,15 +61,44 @@ fi
 sleep 1
 
 if [ -d "${APP_BUNDLE}" ]; then
-  for _ in {1..10}; do
-    if pgrep -f "${EXPECTED_PROCESS}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
-      break
-    fi
+  proc_pidpath() {
+    python3 - "$1" <<'PY'
+import ctypes
+import sys
+
+pid = int(sys.argv[1])
+buf = ctypes.create_string_buffer(4096)
+lib = ctypes.CDLL("/usr/lib/libproc.dylib")
+ret = lib.proc_pidpath(pid, buf, ctypes.sizeof(buf))
+if ret <= 0:
+    raise SystemExit(1)
+print(buf.value.decode("utf-8", errors="replace"))
+PY
+  }
+
+  launched_from_checkout=0
+  for _ in {1..50}; do
+    while read -r pid; do
+      path="$(proc_pidpath "${pid}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+      if [ -n "${path}" ] && [ "${path}" = "${EXPECTED_PROCESS_RESOLVED}" ]; then
+        launched_from_checkout=1
+        break
+      fi
+    done < <(pgrep -x "${APP_NAME}" || true)
+
+    if [ "${launched_from_checkout}" -eq 1 ]; then break; fi
     sleep 0.2
   done
 
-  if ! pgrep -f "${EXPECTED_PROCESS}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  if [ "${launched_from_checkout}" -ne 1 ]; then
     log "ERROR: ${APP_NAME} did not launch from this checkout."
+    log "Expected: ${EXPECTED_PROCESS_RESOLVED}"
+    while read -r pid; do
+      path="$(proc_pidpath "${pid}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+      if [ -n "${path}" ]; then
+        log "Running: ${path}"
+      fi
+    done < <(pgrep -x "${APP_NAME}" || true)
     log "Hint: another RepoBar build may be running from a different path; run:"
     log "  pgrep -af \"${APP_PROCESS_PATTERN}\""
     exit 1

@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ if [ "${SKIP_BUILD:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
 else
   log "==> Building ${APP_NAME} (${CONFIGURATION})"
   swift build -c "${CONFIGURATION}"
-  swift build -c "${CONFIGURATION}" --product repobar
+  swift build -c "${CONFIGURATION}" --product repobarcli
 fi
 
 BUILD_DIR="${ROOT_DIR}/.build/${CONFIGURATION}"
@@ -42,11 +42,11 @@ mkdir -p "${APP_BUNDLE}/Contents/MacOS" "${APP_BUNDLE}/Contents/Frameworks"
 cp "${APP_EXECUTABLE}" "${APP_BUNDLE}/Contents/MacOS/${APP_NAME}"
 chmod +x "${APP_BUNDLE}/Contents/MacOS/${APP_NAME}" || true
 
-CLI_BINARY="${BUILD_DIR}/repobar"
+CLI_BINARY="${BUILD_DIR}/repobarcli"
 if [ -f "${CLI_BINARY}" ]; then
-  log "==> Installing repobar"
-  cp "${CLI_BINARY}" "${APP_BUNDLE}/Contents/MacOS/repobar"
-  chmod +x "${APP_BUNDLE}/Contents/MacOS/repobar" || true
+  log "==> Installing repobarcli"
+  cp "${CLI_BINARY}" "${APP_BUNDLE}/Contents/MacOS/repobarcli"
+  chmod +x "${APP_BUNDLE}/Contents/MacOS/repobarcli" || true
 fi
 
 RESOURCE_BUNDLE="${BUILD_DIR}/${APP_NAME}_${APP_NAME}.bundle"

@@ -10,11 +10,11 @@
     "docs:list": "node Scripts/docs-list.mjs",
     "test": "swift test",
     "build": "swift build",
-    "repobar": "swift build --product repobar && ./Scripts/codesign_cli.sh .build/debug/repobar && .build/debug/repobar",
+    "repobar": "swift build --product repobarcli && ./Scripts/codesign_cli.sh .build/debug/repobarcli && .build/debug/repobarcli",
     "repobarcli": "pnpm -s repobar",
     "start": "./Scripts/compile_and_run.sh",
-    "restart": "pnpm start",
-    "stop": "pkill -f \".build/debug/RepoBar\" || true",
+    "restart": "true",
+    "stop": "pkill -f \"RepoBar.app/Contents/MacOS/RepoBar\" || true",
     "codegen": "./Scripts/apollo_codegen.sh",
     "ghql": "pnpm exec tsx Scripts/ghql.ts",
     "ghrest": "pnpm exec tsx Scripts/ghrest.ts"
